message:
feat(routing,toon,quiet): extend cross-project routing to all mutation commands, add TOON output format, and complete quiet mode support

Cross-project routing:
- Extend routing support from show/update to close, reopen, defer/undefer,
  comments (add/list), label (add/remove/list), and delete commands
- Each command refactored into execute_with_args (top-level dispatcher) +
  execute_route (single-project executor) pattern
- Add reorder_routed_items_by_requested_inputs to preserve user's original
  input order when mixing local and external routes
- New outcome enums (CloseOutcome, DeferredOutcome, ReopenOutcome) for
  ordered tracking across routed batches

TOON output format:
- Add ctx.is_toon() / ctx.toon(&payload) support to close, comments,
  defer, delete, info, label, q, reopen, and where commands
- Consistent pattern: check is_toon() before is_json()

Quiet mode:
- Add ctx.is_quiet() early-returns to config (show paths), delete
  (preview, dry-run, result), epic (status, close-eligible), info,
  label (all subcommands), and q commands

Last-touched context tracking:
- Ensure every mutation command updates last-touched issue ID file
- DB mode: set_last_touched_id inline after mutation succeeds
- No-db mode: update only after flush_no_db_then succeeds
- Delete: clear last-touched if deleted issue was last-touched
- Create dry-run: explicitly skip last-touched update

Atomic flush-before-render (flush_no_db_then):
- New method on OpenStorageResult that flushes JSONL first, then calls
  success callback — prevents showing success when flush would have failed
- Auto-rebuild missing .beads/beads.db from issues.jsonl
- Force-flush for hard deletes via needs_flush metadata flag

Update command atomicity:
- Two-phase approach: prepare_single_route (validate) then
  execute_prepared_route (mutate) — prevents partial updates
- New ParentUpdatePlan enum and PreparedUpdateRoute struct
- Parent validation (cycle detection, self-dependency) runs before
  any database mutations begin

Config command improvements:
- Canonical config key normalization (trim, lowercase, - to _)
- Extracted load_mutable_yaml_config with proper malformed YAML errors
- Atomic config delete: pre-validates all YAML targets before mutating
- --no-db respects DB reads for config get/list
- --project/--user conflict annotation on config list

Dependency edge semantics fix:
- get_blocker_ids and get_blocked_issue_ids use explicit allowlist
  (blocks, conditional-blocks, waits-for) instead of != parent-child
- Related edges no longer incorrectly treated as blocking

Delete command enhancements:
- Structured preview output (DeletePreviewResult) for JSON/TOON
- Hard delete reports labels_removed and events_removed counts
- Input IDs sorted and deduplicated before processing

Other improvements:
- q --parent accepts short/partial IDs via IdResolver
- where command: priority reorder for prefix detection, mixed prefix
  detection returns None instead of first found
- comments: bounded stdin reads with explicit byte limit and overflow error
- show: preserve requested order for text/rich output (not just JSON)

Tests:
- ~3100 lines of new E2E tests covering last-touched, TOON output,
  quiet mode, routing order preservation, config atomicity, delete
  improvements, update atomicity, no-db hard delete flush, and
  missing DB auto-rebuild

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
